events.name: Mariano's 30th Birthday & Chicago Trip
events.context: Mariano turns 30 on March 19th. Plan: 1-2 night warm backpacking trip (Mar 14-15), then fly to Chicago for birthday celebration (Mar 19). Flights to Chicago already booked.
events.hook: Hugo needs to find a warm backpacking destination, book those flights, arrange gear rentals from REI, and pick out a gift for Mariano.

actions.name: Find warm backpacking destination (1-2 night, mid-March)
Book flight from backpacking to Chicago
Figure out REI gear rentals (backpack, tent, sleeping bag)

events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana, March 23 - April 7. Route: Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. Planning to buy 4 pairs of eyeglasses in Japan.
events.hook: Hugo should finalize activity plans for Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo, research eyeglasses stores in Kyoto, and validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
